abilities.name: Data Scan
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Basic Action, choose one enemy. You learn their Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice.

abilities.name: Tactical Override
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action on your turn, you may move one allied Digimon up to 2 spaces in any direction before their turn begins.

abilities.name: Calculated Strike
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Knowledge rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon misses an attack, you may spend 3 Hope to reroll the attack roll and take the higher result.

abilities.name: Exploit Weakness
abilities.description: When your Digimon attacks an enemy you have already scanned this encounter, they deal +Knowledge rank bonus damage on that attack.

abilities.name: Digimon Encyclopedia
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 2 ability, Knowledge rank 5
abilities.description: Once per session you may declare that your character has researched a specific Digimon type before this encounter. You automatically know their Attribute, Element, and two combat stats without spending a scan action.

abilities.name: Full Analysis
abilities.requirements: Data Scan and Exploit Weakness, Knowledge rank 5
abilities.description: Data Scan now reveals ALL of the target's combat stats in addition to their Attribute and Element.

abilities.name: Prodigious
abilities.description: Once per encounter after an enemy takes an action, you may use your Free Action to predict their next move. The GM tells you one of the following: which target they will attack next, which move they plan to use, or whether they intend to move. You can only predict one thing per activation.
